name: Indonesian Peanut Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 cup shelled, roasted, unsalted peanuts, pulverized in a blender or chopper
3 chili peppers or other hot peppers (minimum), minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into small cubes.
2. Sauté the chicken in oil over medium heat until cooked through and no longer pink.
3. Remove from heat and transfer to a blender with garlic, water, soy sauce, turmeric, and lime juice.
4. Blend until smooth, about 30 seconds.
5. Place the mixture back on low heat and cover. Cook for at least 20 minutes, stirring occasionally, until thickened.
6. Sauté onion rings in remaining oil over medium heat until translucent.
7. Cook rice according to package instructions.
8. Mix chicken and sauce with rice.
9. Serve hot, placing onion rings on top.
